preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pharmaceuticals Laboratory' AND is_template = true

column.name: objective
column.value: Pharmaceutical sample workflows from creation through quality check

column.name: content
column.value: Pharmaceuticals Laboratory notebook with initial sample creation and QC pages

changeSet.author: openelis-pharma

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pharmaceuticals Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Pharmaceuticals Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 1

changeSet.comment: Create Sample Creation & Full Metadata Capture page for Pharmaceuticals Laboratory notebook

column.name: instructions
column.value: Create pharmaceutical samples with complete traceability from reception. Capture sample identity, material/category, core chemistry metadata, and any clinical context. System generates barcode/QR and sets status to Created - Pending QC.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pharmaceuticals Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pharmaceuticals Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 1

changeSet.author: openelis-pharma

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pharmaceuticals Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Pharmaceuticals Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 2

changeSet.comment: Create Raw Sample Quality Check (QC) page for Pharmaceuticals Laboratory notebook

column.name: instructions
column.value: Perform initial QC on pharmaceutical samples: check container integrity, label readability, visual appearance, volume/weight, and environmental condition deviations. Record pass/fail with remarks and move compliant samples forward.

column.name: content
column.value: Raw Sample Quality Check (QC) - Assess condition, integrity, and readiness for further processing

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pharmaceuticals Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pharmaceuticals Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 2
